items.title: It might get late early... because Thunder are getting blitzed right now and used a timeout earlier to save possession on a steal, they have only three timeouts for the rest of the game.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
It might get late early... because Thunder are getting blitzed right now and used a timeout earlier to save possession on a steal, they have only three timeouts for the rest of the game. 

They can't really burn more than one if they are on the wrong end of another cold streak.

items.title: Julian Champagnie seemed very relaxed in the locker room before the game, but that's how he is pretty much all the time.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Julian Champagnie seemed very relaxed in the locker room before the game, but that's how he is pretty much all the time.

Still, he's coming up big in a pressure-packed setting with 17 points powered by 5 of 6 from deep in 23 minutes.

Also note that defensive rebound he snagged before his last 3.

items.title: Fever guards Caitlin Clark (5) and Raven Johnson (4) in foul trouble. Clark exits before the end of the 3Q. She's never fouled out of a WNBA game.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever guards Caitlin Clark (5) and Raven Johnson (4) in foul trouble. Clark exits before the end of the 3Q. She's never fouled out of a WNBA game.

Fever led 8-2, but it's been Fire since. 87-62 entering the 4th.

items.title: Fire have 7 turnovers through three quarters tonight after having 28 last night. Forced 15 on the other end so far. Up 87-62 going into the fourth. Clark's been a complete non-factor for Indy and just picked up her fifth foul.

items.title: Best Game Scores in a Conf Finals Game 7 (since 73-74):
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt:
Best Game Scores in a Conf Finals Game 7 (since 73-74):
-Barkley lapped the field (44 pts 24 rebs) v Kemp in 93
-AI v MIL in 01 & Bird v DET in 87 are almost tied
-The top 25 is mostly HOF players except Caleb Martin in 23 
-EJ had 34 pts in 26 min in 93
www.sports-reference.com/stathead/tin...

items.title: That 2nd quarter bucket buffet from Shai was nice and all
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
That 2nd quarter bucket buffet from Shai was nice and all

But OKC is not winning tonight like that. They need significantly more from the other All-Star (4 points, 1/2 FGs for Chet) and shooters (non-Shai 3-point shooters missed 12 of 16 attempts).

I expect more than 10 shots from Wemby as well.

items.title: SAS leads OKC 56-53 at the half.
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
SAS leads OKC 56-53 at the half.

Stephon Castle: 12 PTS, 3 REB
De'Aaron Fox: 10 PTS, 3 AST

Shai Gilgeous-Alexander: 19 PTS, 5 AST
Jared McCain: 10 PTS, 2 3PM

📺 2nd half LIVE on NBC & Peacock: www.nba.com/how-to-watch...

3-point game at the break of Game 7 on NBC/Peacock!

items.title: Luck adjusted halftime score
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
Luck adjusted halftime score

SAS 51
OKC 55

via primestats.net

Glossary: An estimate of how many points the team would have scored had it shot its "normal" percentage based on the player taking the shot, its location, and when it occurred in the shot clock.

items.title: Sloppy in every way for the Fever. Fire love to play aggressive with traps and pressure, and the Fever handled it well last week. Have really struggled with it today. 13 turnovers for the Fever, who are down 18.
